cases.text: db_password = os.environ['DB_PASSWORD']  # read from env, no secret in source
provisioned Twilio API Key SK3f9c1e8b7d62049f5e1c0a8b4d7e2f6c for the messaging service
cases.note: Twilio Key SID (SK + 32 lowercase hex) is a documented public identifier (Not PII), paired with a separately-issued secret; suppressed in the generic fallback and no longer carried by a structured rule. A future rule re-catching this shape must fail here on purpose. https://www.twilio.com/docs/iam/api-keys/key-resource-v1
